name: DROPSOL
short_description: DROPSOL is a retro-style arcade game where, equipped only with a parasol that reduces your speed, you have to dodge obstacles and take special items to increase your chances of getting a big score.
detailed_description:
Dropped into a dark and endless alley filled with random obstacles and special items, Jim must use his only tool, a parasol that reduces his speed, to reach deeper and deeper - and, of course, to achieve a big score! DROPSOL is a small but fun retro-style casual arcade game that will challenge you to get the biggest score you can!

> Main features:
- Retro-style graphics;
- Parasol that reduces your speed (but with limit durability!);
- Powerups - more parasol durability or invincibility (breaks the steel beams);
- Items that increases your speed and take points from your score;
- Arcade/Score Attack;
- Hi-Score automatic saving;
- Score leaderboard.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
